metricEn: Discussion, by region, of management process for ensuring quality and patient safety during clinical trials
metric: 按區域說明確保臨床試驗品質與受試者安全的管理流程

metricEn: Number of inspections related to clinical trial management and pharmacovigilance that resulted in: (1) entity voluntary remediation
metric: 與臨床試驗管理與藥物監測相關之稽查中，導致：(1) 實體自願性補救措施 的次數

metricEn: Number of inspections related to clinical trial management and pharmacovigilance that resulted in: (2) regulatory or administrative actions taken against the entity
metric: 與臨床試驗管理與藥物監測相關之稽查中，導致：(2) 對實體採取監管或行政措施 的次數

metricEn: Total amount of monetary losses as a result of legal proceedings associated with clinical trials in developing countries
metric: 因開發中國家臨床試驗相關訴訟所產生的金額損失總額

metricEn: Description of actions and initiatives to promote access to health care products for priority diseases and in priority countries as defined by the Access to Medicine Index
metric: 說明提升醫療產品可近性之行動與倡議，涵蓋 Access to Medicine Index 所定義的優先疾病與國家

metricEn: List of products on the WHO List of Prequalified Medicinal Products as part of its Prequalification of Medicines Programme (PQP)
metric: 列出納入世界衛生組織 (WHO) 藥品預認證計畫 (PQP) 的藥品清單

metricEn: Percentage change in: (1) weighted average list price across product portfolio compared to previous reporting period
metric: 產品組合中：(1) 加權平均定價 相較前一報告期間的變動百分比

metricEn: Percentage change in: (2) weighted average net price across product portfolio compared to previous reporting period
metric: 產品組合中：(2) 加權平均淨價 相較前一報告期間的變動百分比

metricEn: Percentage change in: (1) list price of product with largest increase compared to previous reporting period
metric: 相較前期，(1) 單一產品定價最高漲幅之變動百分比

metricEn: Percentage change in: (2) net price of product with largest increase compared to previous reporting period
metric: 相較前期，(2) 單一產品淨價最高漲幅之變動百分比

metricEn: Products listed in public medical product safety or adverse event alert databases
metric: 被列入公開藥品安全或不良事件警示資料庫的產品

metricEn: Number of fatalities associated with products
metric: 與產品相關的死亡事件數量

metricEn: (1) Number of recalls issued
metric: (1) 發布產品召回的次數

metricEn: (2) Total units recalled
metric: (2) 總召回產品單位數

metricEn: Total amount of product accepted for take-back, reuse, or disposal
metric: 回收、重複使用或處置的產品總量

metricEn: Number of enforcement actions taken in response to violations of good manufacturing practices (GMP) or equivalent standards, by type
metric: 因違反良好製造規範（GMP）或同等標準而採取之執法行動次數，按類型區分

metricEn: Description of methods and technologies used to maintain traceability of products throughout the supply chain and prevent counterfeiting
metric: 說明於供應鏈中維持產品可追溯性並防範仿冒所採用的方法與技術

metricEn: Discussion of process for alerting customers and business partners to potential or known risks associated with counterfeit products
metric: 說明針對偽藥風險之通報流程，包括對客戶與業務夥伴之提醒方式

metricEn: Number of actions that led to raids, seizure, arrests, or filing of criminal charges related to counterfeit products
metric: 導致偽藥相關查緝、查扣、逮捕或提起刑事訴訟之執行行動次數

metricEn: Total amount of monetary losses as a result of legal proceedings associated with false marketing claims
metric: 因虛假行銷主張所引發之法律訴訟造成的金額損失總額

metricEn: Description of code of ethics governing promotion of off-label use of products
metric: 說明管控產品非標示用途推廣行為的倫理準則

metricEn: Discussion of talent recruitment and retention efforts for scientists and research and development staff
metric: 說明針對科學家與研發人員的人才招募與留任措施

metric: (1) 自願離職率：針對 (a) 高階主管

metric: (1) 自願離職率：針對 (b) 中階主管

metric: (1) 自願離職率：針對 (c) 專業人員

metric: (1) 自願離職率：針對 (d) 其他類別員工

metric: (2) 非自願離職率：針對 (a) 高階主管

metric: (2) 非自願離職率：針對 (b) 中階主管

metric: (2) 非自願離職率：針對 (c) 專業人員

metric: (2) 非自願離職率：針對 (d) 其他類別員工

metricEn: Percentage of: (1) entity’s facilities participating in the Rx-360 International Pharmaceutical Supply Chain Consortium audit programme or equivalent third-party audit programmes for integrity of supply chain and ingredients
metric: (1) 實體設施參與 Rx-360 或等效第三方稽核計畫（供應鏈與成分誠信）之比例

metricEn: Percentage of: (2) Tier I suppliers’ facilities participating in the Rx-360 International Pharmaceutical Supply Chain Consortium audit programme or equivalent third-party audit programmes for integrity of supply chain and ingredients
metric: (2) 第一層供應商設施參與 Rx-360 或等效第三方稽核計畫（供應鏈與成分誠信）之比例

metricEn: Total amount of monetary losses as a result of legal proceedings associated with corruption and bribery
metric: 因貪污與賄賂相關法律訴訟所造成的金額損失總額

metric: 說明規範與醫療專業人員互動的倫理準則內容
